claims.description: GNU m4 1.4.21 admitted: located, fingerprinted, smoke-tested. 65/75 oracle compare pass (87%).
All 17 GNU m4 1.4.21 CLI flags wired (-D/-U/-I/-P/-s/-d/-t/-l/-F/-R/-G/-E/-W/-L). Stdin/files/exit codes/LC_ALL=C. 1 permanent non-claim: POSIX signals.
Multi-byte delimiter lexer with same-pass changequote re-lex (M4.QUOTE.DEEP.1). Nested quotes, comments, 0x01 token markers.
Quote nesting, delimiter changes via changequote, same-pass timing via token re-lex. Empty-quote concat.
changecom, dnl, comment consumption matching GNU m4. changecom excluded from same-pass re-lex (GNU m4 behavior).
Eight-bit-clean. Core uses &[u8]. Byte-exact verified for ASCII, high bytes, UTF-8, control chars, tabs.
define, undefine, builtin copy via defn. Macro table with pushdef/popdef stacks.
$n/$@/$*/$#/$0 substitution. Rescanning. Self-recursion prevention. CROSS.38 forloop FIXED. Pure-text fast path.
Nested parens, quoted commas, expansion during collection. Whitespace after macro name.
pushdef, popdef, defn, builtin, indir. Builtin shadowing. -P prefix mode.
len, index, substr, translit, regexp, patsubst, format. All oracle-admitted.
eval (32-bit signed, all GNU operators), incr, decr. 10 Kani proofs.
divert, undivert, divnum, negative discard, EOF auto-undivert, file undivert uninterpreted copy.
include, sinclude, -I search path, directory-of-including-file logic.
errprint, __file__, __line__, m4exit working. Class/location match. Byte-exact wording not claimed (CROSS.7).
traceon, traceoff, debugmode, debugfile, dumpdef, -d flags, -t name.
syscmd, esyscmd, sysval working. Sandboxed in tests. fd inheritance (CROSS.12) and signal encoding (CROSS.34) monitored.
-F/-R cross-compatible with GNU m4 1.4.21 (8 oracle smoke tests). V1 two-line format.
10 AC_DEFUN-pattern seed fixtures pass (tests/autoconf_seed.rs). Full Autoconf not claimed.
Panic-free: unclosed quotes, deep nesting, binary bytes, huge defs, large diversions, missing files.
1M deterministic fuzz: 0 panics. 3 libfuzzer targets. 10 Kani formal verification proofs.
